title: 云厂商数据
summary: 面向用户的云厂商统一入口，覆盖 AWS、Microsoft Azure / Intelligent Cloud、Google Cloud、Alibaba Cloud、Tencent Cloud / Tencent FBS proxy、Huawei Cloud / Cloud Computing、Oracle Cloud 的云业务经营指标、季度/年度披露边界、source-gap、外部数据源可替代性和预测可用性说明。
scope: 云厂商收入、利润、利润率、同比、季度/年度披露口径、预测边界和来源核验。

notes: This is a front-end simplification entry. It points to the official period-level and audit packages rather than duplicating all cloud rows.
Formal period-level cloud values are in quarterly_competitor_metrics_2026-06-18.
Concise FY2023-FY2025 summaries are preserved in cloud_vendor_metrics_2026-06-17 but hidden from the default picker.
External dataset replacement decisions are preserved in external_dataset_assessment_2026-06-19 but hidden from the default picker.
